category_sources: source_facts.description says spicetify-cli is a command-line tool to customize the Spotify client.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is spicetify-cli; official Spicetify documentation brands the project as Spicetify.
docs_sources: Official spicetify.app provides a dedicated documentation path under /docs/getting-started.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/spicetify/cli, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Spotify customization CLI; source_facts.executables lists spicetify; official Spicetify docs cover installing and using the tool.
